Dashboard.description: Monitor your private skills, credits, MCP access keys, recent usage, and payment orders from one place.
Dashboard.mcpCallsDescription: All recorded OceanSkill MCP invocations for this account.
Dashboard.emptyKeys: No API keys yet. Create one when you connect your first MCP client.
Dashboard.emptyUsage: No usage has been recorded yet.
Dashboard.securityDescription: This dashboard validates your signed JWT with Supabase getClaims(), and every query is still constrained by row-level security for your user ID.
